title: Hephaestus
description: Become the best blacksmith and craft strong tools.
body:
# <center>Hephaestus
Enchance the blacksmithing experience by adding expanded mechanics, such as differential hardening, allowing you to craft high quality tools and weapons.


## Features*

<details>
<summary>Item Quality</summary>
Tools with higher quality have higher damage and durability.

![A Golden Sword with a improved quality](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49d58549d8f4d8fa518e74d09cb243b36303bae9.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Blacksmith tongs</summary>
Works just like a bundle.

![blacksmith tongs working like bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d26d440dee9a95bab28c178c25bba7bba7d650b3.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>New crafting mechanic</summary>
Hold click on a fire sources while holding a item in tongs to heat it before using the hammer on a anvil. the heat of the item change the resulting quality upon hit.

![the process of making a iron blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qwp5nncW/images/f9c5f716c3ae31301ebe9033dfcb1e8fa9002dbf.gif)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Sieve</summary>
Find resources in sand.

![sieveing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qwp5nncW/images/4ef39065a0f62ee2f68d76e352af3ab3cf4b8545.gif)
</details>


*Non exhaustive
##
_versions before 3.x do not work the same as the mod have been completly rewritten_

requires [Cardinal Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)
